summary: Tested Conversion Factor Calculator feature in ingredient modal. All 8 backend tests passed. UI verified: calculator section, auto-calculation, manual edit, cost preview, history button, audit logs panel all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Create ingredient with conversion factor fields (purchase_unit, purchase_quantity, dispatch_quantity, conversion_factor)
Backend: Update ingredient creates audit logs for conversion field changes
Backend: Audit logs track changed_by_id and changed_by_name
Backend: GET /ingredients/{id}/affected-recipes returns count and recipe list
Backend: GET /ingredients/{id}/audit-logs returns history of changes
Backend: Manual conversion factor edit allowed and recalculates dispatch_unit_cost
Frontend: 'Calculadora de Factor de Conversión' section visible in ingredient dialog
Frontend: All fields visible - Unidad de Compra, Cantidad de Compra, Equivalencia en Despacho, Factor de Conversión
Frontend: Auto-calculation works (changing dispatch_quantity updates conversion_factor)
Frontend: 'Edición libre permitida' text displayed under Factor de Conversión
Frontend: Cost preview 'Costo por [unit]' updates in real-time
Frontend: 'Historial' button appears in Edit mode
Frontend: Clicking Historial shows 'Historial de Cambios' panel with audit logs
Frontend: Audit logs show field_changed, old_value → new_value, date, changed_by_name
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_Carne_Libra ingredient for testing audit logs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Conversion Factor Calculator feature fully implemented and tested. Key backend endpoints: PUT /ingredients/{id} creates audit logs, GET /ingredients/{id}/affected-recipes, GET /ingredients/{id}/audit-logs. Frontend shows calculator in ingredient modal with Historial button in edit mode.

fields.purchase_unit: Dropdown for unit used when purchasing (e.g., Libra)
fields.dispatch_quantity: Numeric input, equivalence in dispatch unit

mocked_apis.status: No APIs are mocked - all endpoints are fully functional
